title: circaea alpina f. pilosula
intro: Circaea alpina f. pilosula, also known as the Alpine Enchanter's Nightshade or Woolly Enchanter's Nightshade, is a flowering plant species within the Circaea genus. This plant is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Circaea alpina f. pilosula include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, and to alleviate skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its soothing and protective properties. In herbal preparations, Circaea alpina f. pilosula is often used as a tincture, infused in teas or added to salves and creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
